fact_nuggets.text: Volt Absorb (Japanese: Electricity Storage) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Restores HP if damaged by an Electric-type move. MD T D S Restores the Pokemon's HP if the Pokemon is hit by an Electric-type move. B S L Conq. Restores HP if hit by an Electric-type move. MD GtI Electric-type moves restore HP instead of damaging the Pokemon. * The Pokemon absorbs Electric-type moves, which restore its HP! * S MD The Pokemon absorbs Electric-type moves, which restore its HP! MD RT DX The Pokemon absorbs Electric-type moves to restore its HP.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation III 1.1.2 Generation IV onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Volt Absorb is hit by a damaging Electric-type move , its HP is restored by one quarter of its maximum HP, and the move will have no effect on that Pokemon (if a Pokemon with this Ability already has full HP, the Electric-type move will do nothing). Volt Absorb will not activate if the Pokemon is protected from the Electric-type move. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Volt Absorb will now also activate when a Pokemon with it is hit by an Electric-type status move . Multistrike moves that are turned into Electric-type moves, such as by being affected by Electrify or Galvanize , will only activate this Ability once. If a Pokemon with Volt Absorb is holding a Cell Battery , Volt Absorb absorbs the move, so the Cell Battery's effect is not triggered. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Volt Absorb has no effect outside of battle.

Volt Absorb will not activate if the Pokemon is protected from the Electric-type move. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Volt Absorb will now also activate when a Pokemon with it is hit by an Electric-type status move . Multistrike moves that are turned into Electric-type moves, such as by being affected by Electrify or Galvanize , will only activate this Ability once. If a Pokemon with Volt Absorb is holding a Cell Battery , Volt Absorb absorbs the move, so the Cell Battery's effect is not triggered.
Absorbs electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
